reason_for_revision: After the 2026-05-06 Amazon squad meeting, the product planning method was upgraded: data decides whether the category is worth entering, but product planning must start from the consumer's vivid mental scene before translating into architecture, components, design, supply chain, and project plan.

meeting_input.core_principle: 产品定义不是先堆参数，而是先找到消费者脑中的画面，再把画面转译成产品能力。

data_integrity.numeric_claims_basis: review counts and opportunity counts inherit v9 review ledger and v14 calibration; no new numeric market claim was introduced.
data_integrity.strategic_weights: inference for product planning only; not a factual metric.

scene_thesis_candidates.name: 先叫醒房间，再叫醒你
scene_thesis_candidates.evidence_basis: gentle_natural_wake, bedside_aesthetic_lamp, brightness_display_pain, company lighting capability
scene_thesis_candidates.why_upgrade: Turns a device feature into a room-level morning event.

scene_thesis_candidates.name: 按一下晚安，明早自然醒
scene_thesis_candidates.why_upgrade: Keeps Hatch's ritual value but avoids being only a Hatch dupe by focusing on the whole night-to-morning ritual.

scene_thesis_candidates.name: 只叫醒你，不吵醒整个房间
scene_thesis_candidates.why_upgrade: More specific household tension; needs additional frontstage and review validation before main track.

scene_thesis_candidates.name: 冬天也有早晨
scene_thesis_candidates.evidence_basis: light_therapy_dark_winter, dark room / winter usage references
scene_thesis_candidates.why_upgrade: Strong content hook but must avoid medical claims.

recommended_next_step: Use v15 as the current product-planning scene thesis page. If accepted, enter 6.2 product architecture around the main thesis: user task effect -> functional conditions -> key components -> test plan.
